# Transcrição: 06-Brandi Munguia

- **Fonte:** 06-Brandi Munguia
- **Duração:** 01:51
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:51]

My name is Brandi Munghia and I wanted to introduce myself to you as I am one of your senior coaches here at Mastermind.com and I look forward to getting to know you and your journey because like you, I was once the student. I was watching the content, implementing the content and growing my business and brand with all of these incredible frameworks that Dean and Tony and our team have put together for you. You are in the right place with the right people. Three years ago, I had found this team and I raised my hand and said I really want to give back. How can I contribute? How can I grow my skill as a coach? And Mastermind not only developed my skills but gave me opportunities to become a better speaker and an all around better person and really diving into the skills it takes to be an entrepreneur. I've been in the entrepreneurial space as a coach for a little over five years and I have a vast background and a couple of different niches. So as you're learning from me, you'll get to learn a little more from my experience. But I will say that the most important thing that I want you to know from me is that we get really passionate here at Mastermind because we see you because we were you. And when we're teaching you these things, it's because we know they work. But most importantly, we need you to believe in yourself as much as we believe in you because your success is absolutely going to happen. You must choose your persistence and you will persevere in this business and in the brand that you're building for yourself. But I want you to know from one to another, again, you're in the right place with the people who want to see you succeed. So I cannot wait to see you bring your vision to life and celebrate with you all along the way. So thank you so much for being here and I can't wait to see you on the inside.
